name: chess.js
when_to_use: 需要解析 FEN/PGN、生成合法着法、验证局面或判定将杀和棋时用它而非手写,因为原生在规则边界、王车易位、吃过路兵和重复局面上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认会写 FEN/PGN 记法,但不能可靠执行合法性规则、枚举着法或判定将杀/逼和/三次重复;徒手推演会间歇产生非法棋局。

data_in.note: notation_type=fen 时 notation 传给 Chess.load:应优先给完整六段 FEN(摆放、行棋方、王车易位、吃过路兵、半回合、回合数),不能把仅摆放段误当完整局面；load 虽会为尾部缺省段补 '- - 0 1',但不会补行棋方。notation_type=pgn 时传完整 PGN 文本。
data_in._why_no_example: FEN/PGN/SAN 都是 AI 原生记法,schema 足以校准,不附 minimal example。

schema.notation: string —— FEN 或 PGN,由 notation_type 判别
schema.strict?: boolean —— PGN 与 SAN 是否启用严格解析,默认 false；FEN 始终默认校验
schema.plies?: Array<string | {from:string,to:string,promotion?:'q'|'r'|'b'|'n'}> —— 在载入局面/棋谱后依次执行的 SAN 或坐标着法,默认 []
schema.verbose_moves?: boolean —— 输出合法着法时是否返回详细对象,默认 false

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；它是真规则引擎,不是棋盘 UI。
provides.outputs: 完整六段 FEN / PGN / 当前合法着法列表 / {turn,inCheck,isCheckmate,isStalemate,isDraw,isGameOver} 状态

api_surface.load: const chess = new Chess(); notation_type==='pgn' ? chess.loadPgn(notation,{strict}) : chess.load(notation)
api_surface.legal: chess.moves({verbose}) —— 当前局面的合法着法
api_surface.snapshot: chess.fen() 返回完整六段 FEN；chess.pgn() 返回当前棋谱

peer.note: 棋盘 UI 消费 chess.fen() 来渲盘面；若某棋盘明确只吃 FEN 摆放段,消费 AI 应显式用 chess.fen().split(' ')[0],不要在本条偷偷截断。棋盘拖子后的合法性校验由消费 AI 接 chess.js 原生 API,不预设统一事件契约。

boot.note: 三载体一致:纯 JS、无 DOM/worker/wasm/uplink；具名 Chess 导出及 v1.4.0 方法名已按上游 README 校对。

isolation.evidence: +esm exports `As as Chess` (named) — boot import {Chess} correct. README confirms all consumed methods: .load(fen,{skipValidation}) (l.555), .loadPgn(pgn,{strict}) (l.576), .move(move,{strict}) (l.661,697,718), .moves({verbose}) (l.732), .inCheck (l.416), .isCheckmate (l.449), .isDraw (l.461), .isStalemate (l.514), .isGameOver (l.53), .fen()/.pgn(). Uses v1.x camelCase (loadPgn/isGameOver) matching 1.4.0. Headless rule engine, no DOM in bundle.

en.when_to_use: Use it to parse FEN/PGN, generate legal moves, validate positions, or detect checkmate and draws instead of implementing the rules by hand, which fails on edge cases, castling, en passant, and repeated positions.
en.why_valuable: AI can write FEN/PGN notation but cannot reliably enforce move legality, enumerate moves, or detect checkmate, stalemate, and threefold repetition; manual analysis intermittently produces illegal games.

data_in.note: When notation_type=fen, notation is passed to Chess.load. Prefer a complete six-field FEN: placement, side to move, castling, en passant, halfmove, and fullmove. Do not mistake the placement field alone for a complete position; load fills missing trailing fields with '- - 0 1' but does not supply the side to move. When notation_type=pgn, pass complete PGN text.

schema.notation: string -- FEN or PGN, selected by notation_type
schema.strict?: boolean -- Enables strict PGN and SAN parsing; default false. FEN validation is always enabled by default
schema.plies?: Array<string | {from:string,to:string,promotion?:'q'|'r'|'b'|'n'}> -- SAN or coordinate moves to execute in order after loading the position/game; default []
schema.verbose_moves?: boolean -- Return detailed objects when listing legal moves; default false
